cells.xml_text_content: NOTE: The Medicare drug portion of this account no longer reflects imputations based off of MEPS data. Rather, the imputations are based off of the Medicare-portion of Marketscan (years 2000-2005) and Medicare Part-D (years 2006-present)
cells.pdf_text_content: NOTE: The Medicare drug portion of this account no longer reflects imputations based off of MEPS data. Rather, the imputations are based off of the Medicare-portion of Marketscan (years 2000-2005) and Medicare Part-D (years 2006-present)

cells.xml_text_content: *NOTE: The Blended Account data after the last quarter of 2015 are based on the updated International Classification of Diseases (ICD-10). Prior years’ data were based on the earlier classification system (ICD-9).  Users should exercise caution when comparing earlier estimates to data for 2015 or later. More information about this change can be found at the Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality: https://www.hcup-us.ahrq.gov/tools_software.jsp
cells.pdf_text_content: *NOTE: The Blended Account data after the last quarter of 2015 are based on the updated International Classification of Diseases (ICD-10). Prior years’ data were based on the earlier classification system (ICD-9).  Users should exercise caution when comparing earlier estimates to data for 2015 or later. More information about this change can be found at the Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality: https://www.hcup-us.ahrq.gov/tools_software.jsp
